if (member && !member.isStateAffected(219)) { // If the member is affected, add it to the affected group. affected.push(member); } } // Divide up the damage by how many members are affected. var heal = Math.ceil((result.hpDamage * 0.5) / affected.length); // We'll go through each of the affected members now. for (var i = 0; i < affected.length; ++i) { // Getting the individual affected member. var member = affected[i]; // Ignore the effect if the member is the target of attack. // The affected member takes damage. var text = heal; if (!member.hasTag("Undead") && !member.isStateCategoryAffected('Undead')){ member.gainHp(heal); // We'll have the affected member reveal a damage popup. var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait'; var font = 'this.standardFontFace()'; var size = 'this.standardFontSize()'; var color = '#BBFF99'; member.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color); } else{ member.gainHp(-heal); var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait'; var font = 'this.standardFontFace()'; var size = 'this.standardFontSize()'; var color = 'this.normalColor()'; member.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color); } // Clear the results of the effect. member.clearResult(); // Next, check to see if the member is dead. if (member.isDead()) { // If the member is dead, we'll make it collapse. member.performCollapse(); } } }

note:

#{statedesc.id0404} var text = '+Fatal Links'; var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait'; var font = 'this.standardFontFace()'; var size = '20'; var color = '#FFFFBB'; target.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color, 0, -32); var slvl = $gameActors.actor(2).skillMasteryLevel(915); var rturn = Math.floor(Math.random() * slvl) + 1; var cturn = target.stateTurns(404); var chance = (30 + $gameActors.actor(2).skillMasteryLevel(915) * 4) * 0.01; if (Math.random() < chance && $gameActors.actor(2).isStateAffected(190)){ target.setStateTurns(404, cturn + rturn);} // Check if the damage is positive. if (this.isPhysical() || this.isMagical() || this.isCertainHit()){ if (value > 0) { // Get the living members of the same party. var members = target.friendsUnit().aliveMembers(); // Make an empty group to list affected members. var affected = []; // We'll go through each member to check them. for (var i = 0; i < members.length; ++i) { // Getting the individual member. var member = members[i]; // Does the member exist and is the member affected by state 91 (the Joint Penalty state)? if (member && member.isStateAffected(404)) { // If the member is affected, add it to the affected group. affected.push(member); } } // Divide up the damage by how many members are affected. value = Math.ceil(value / affected.length); // We'll go through each of the affected members now. for (var i = 0; i < affected.length; ++i) { // Getting the individual affected member. var member = affected[i]; // Ignore the effect if the member is the target of attack. if (member !== target) { // Let's play animation 12 on the affected member. member.startAnimation(331); // The affected member takes damage. member.gainHp(-value); // We'll have the affected member reveal a damage popup. var text = value; var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait'; var font = 'this.standardFontFace()'; var size = 'this.standardFontSize()'; var color = 'this.normalColor()'; member.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color); // Clear the results of the effect. member.clearResult(); // Next, check to see if the member is dead. if (member.isDead()) { // If the member is dead, we'll make it collapse. member.performCollapse(); } } } } }

#{statedesc.id0407} var text = '+Paralyzed'; var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait'; var font = 'this.standardFontFace()'; var size = '20'; var color = '#FFFFBB'; target.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color, 0, -32); var slvl = $gameActors.actor(2).skillMasteryLevel(915); var rturn = Math.floor(Math.random() * slvl) + 1; var cturn = target.stateTurns(407); var chance = (30 + $gameActors.actor(2).skillMasteryLevel(915) * 4) * 0.01; if (Math.random() < chance && $gameActors.actor(2).isStateAffected(190)){ target.setStateTurns(407, cturn + rturn);} // Disables instant skills from paralyze as to not abuse the mechanic. // Set the paralyze success rate. if (user.hasTag("Boss")){ var paralyzeRate = 0.1; var rate = 0.4;} else{ var paralyzeRate = 0.25; var rate = 0.25;} // Make a random number check to see if paralyze passes... if (Math.random() < paralyzeRate) { // If it does, play the paralyze animation on the target. user.startAnimation(319); // Check for the user's current action... if (user.currentAction()) { // And make the user consume its resources. user.useItem(user.currentAction().item()); } // Clear the user's actions making the user lose the actions. user.clearActions(); var max = BattleManager.ctbTarget(); var bonus = rate * max + origin.ctbSpeed(); origin.setCTBSpeed(bonus); // Get the log window from battle. var logWindow = SceneManager._scene._logWindow; // Check if the paralyze state has text in message 3 if (state.message3) { // If it does, create a message based on it. var msg = '
' + user.name() + state.message3; // Add the text to the log window to display in battle. logWindow.addText(msg); } // Make the battle wait for the paralysis animation to finish playing. BattleManager.actionWaitForAnimation(); // Clear the log window. logWindow.push('clear'); }

name: Prismheart
note:
<Custom Passive Condition>

user._prismheartTurn = user._prismheartTurn || 0;
condition = true;
} else {
user._prismheartTurn = undefined;
condition = false;}
</Custom Passive Condition>

<Custom Turn End Effect>
user._prismheartTurn = (user._prismheartTurn || 0) + 1;
if (user._prismheartTurn >= 2) {
  // Define stance data
  var stances = [
    {id:244, anim:260, text:'Offensive Stance!', color:'#ff3838'},
    {id:245, anim:261, text:'Defensive Stance!', color:'#fffc0a'},
    {id:246, anim:262, text:'Absolute Stance!', color:'#b519e0'},
    {id:null,anim:263, text:'Stanceless!',      color:'#08c9c6'} // no state
  ];

  // Detect current stance
  var current = -1;
  if (user.isStateAffected(244)) current = 0;
  else if (user.isStateAffected(245)) current = 1;
  else if (user.isStateAffected(246)) current = 2;
  else current = 3; // stanceless

  // Pick a different stance
  var pool = stances.map((s,i)=>i).filter(i=>i!==current);
  var s = stances[pool[Math.randomInt(pool.length)]];

  // Reset stance states
  user.removeState(244);
  user.removeState(245);
  user.removeState(246);

  // Apply new stance effect
  user.startAnimation(s.anim);
  if (s.id) user.addState(s.id);
  if (s.id === 246) { // Absolute stance penalty
    user.gainHp(-Math.round(user.hp * 0.15));
    user.startDamagePopup();
  }
  if (s.id === null) { // Stanceless heal
    user.gainHp(Math.round(user.mhp * 0.1));
    user.startDamagePopup();
  }

  // Popup
  target.callCustomPopup(
    s.text,
    'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait',
    'this.standardFontFace()',
    '21',
    s.color,
    0, -58
  );

  // Reset turn counter
  user._prismheartTurn = 0;
}

</Custom Turn End Effect>
